"[21] [Appended, 13:17:14] [1] [12:01:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (626) 626-5712 has entered the chat[12:01:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (626) 626-5712: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 07:00PM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2526 (N), Longitude -117.8595 (W).The user is NOT AT THE LOCATION of the emergency.[12:01:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (626) 626-5712: The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +16266265712.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.[12:01:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (626) 626-5712: The user requests help at the INCIDENT LOCATION described as: Azusa canyon passing east forkResponders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 546 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA![12:01:55 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] (626) 626-5712: Two-way text with the user is now available.[12:02:24 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Richard Oceguera has entered the chat[12:02:24 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026] Richard Oceguera: 911 EMERGENCY WHAT ARE YOU REPORTINGCall initiated: 12:01:54 GMT-07:00 10 Jun 2026Phone number: (626) 626-5712"

details.IncidentDetail: "[26] THE FLAG NOW HAS VEH AT THEIR YARD - REQ 180 - PREVIOUS CHP DISPATCHER THEY SPOKE TO ADVS THEM THE PTY IS REPORTING THE VEH STOLEN SINCE IT'S MISSING FRM THE FWY [Shared]"

"[24] [Appended, 13:58:04] [13] THE FLAG WENT OUT THRU 3A - WAS TOLD BY 3A TO TAKE THE VEH TO THE TOW YARD EVEN THOUGH IT WAS 1124 SINCE 3A HAD IT AS A HOT CALL - THE FLAG NOW HAS THE VEH AT THEIR TOW YARD "
"[23] [Appended, 13:58:04] [12] REF L/IN0454 / 1039 THE FLAG TOW, THEY WILL CONTACT RO"
"[19] [Appended, 13:58:04] [8] THE FLAG TOW LL ADVG THEY TOOK THE VEH TO THEIR YARD WILL HAVE THEM CONTACT RO "
"[8] THE FLAG ADVG VEH WAS 1124 / VEH WAS TAKEN BACK TO THE FLAG TOW YARD / 3A WAS NOTIFIED"
"[17] [Appended, 13:58:04] [6] HE SAID CHP CAME OUT EARLIER AND HELP HIM MOVE THE VEH AND HE TAGGED IT "
"[15] [Appended, 13:58:04] [4] RP ADV HE LEFT HIS SIL TOYT SOLARA ON RHS 215 / LA CADENA"
